properties.name: github.api.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait when establishing a connection to the GitHub API before timing out.

properties.name: github.webhook.secret
properties.description: Shared secret used to verify the HMAC-SHA256 signature on incoming GitHub webhook payloads.

properties.name: github.api.token
properties.description: Personal access token used to authenticate outbound requests to the GitHub REST API.

properties.name: github.api.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for a response from the GitHub API after a connection has been established.

properties.name: github.api.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the GitHub REST API. Defaults to https://api.github.com.

properties.name: pipeline.job.scheduler.interval-ms
properties.description: How often in milliseconds the job scheduler polls for eligible PENDING jobs.
